DAX Expression: AVERAGE('CB-SYE 25-26 Data'[Satifaction Survey - Student - Host Business ])

VAR ActualValue = [Interns Placed]
VAR TargetValue = 355
VAR _Variance = ActualValue - TargetValue
VAR VariancePercent = DIVIDE(_Variance, TargetValue, 0)
VAR PercentText = FORMAT(VariancePercent, "0.0%")
VAR Result = 
    FORMAT(TargetValue, "#,##0") & 
    " (" & 
    IF(VariancePercent >= 0, "+", "") & 
    PercentText & 
    ")"
RETURN
    Result

VAR Result = CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('CB-SYE 25-26 Data'),
    'CB-SYE 25-26 Data'[Status] = "Placed"
)
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(Result), 0, Result)

VAR ActualValue = [Interns Placed]
VAR TargetValue = 355
VAR PercentOfTarget = DIVIDE(ActualValue, TargetValue, 0)
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        PercentOfTarget >= 0.9 && PercentOfTarget <= 1, "Green",   // 90–100%
        PercentOfTarget >= 0.75 && PercentOfTarget < 0.9, "Yellow",// 75–89.99%
        "Red"                                                      // Below 75%
    )

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('2026 Job Placements 12-22'),
    '2026 Job Placements 12-22'[New or Returning ] = "New"
)
